channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: AI costs spiral as firms lose spending control
item.description: Companies are facing massive AI bills, with one firm reportedly spending $500 million in a month on Claude AI due to unchecked usage. Several global firms are now cutting back on AI spending, changing pricing, or rehiring engineers to manage ballooning costs… [Anthropic, ServiceNow]

item.title: Foxconn approves record $0.22 per share cash dividend for 2025
item.description: According to Liu, Hon Hai invests more than NTUSD 100 billion (USD 3.05 billion) a year in research and development, which accounts for 1.5 per cent to 2 per cent of the company's annual revenue

item.title: US-led AI investments risk capital destruction: Chris Wood
item.description: Jefferies' Chris Wood warns of significant capital destruction in the current AI investment cycle, drawing parallels to past boom-and-bust scenarios. He highlights that US tech giants, investing heavily in AI capex, are most likely to bear the brunt of this p…

item.title: Goldman Sachs predicts capacitor stocks will surge as AI data centers devour components
item.description: AI-driven demand for capacitors could extend industry growth cycles, impacting global supply chains and investment strategies significantly. The post Goldman Sachs predicts capacitor stocks will surge as AI data centers devour components appeared first on Cry…

item.title: AI is moving fast. Official Ireland is not
item.description: Looking at the AI boom now recalls the chaotic dot-com bubble of the late 1990s, though there is little doubt that jobs are on the line [ServiceNow]

item.title: OpenAI has discussed adding Citigroup, JPMorgan to bank lineup for IPO
item.description: OpenAI filling out its roster of underwriters would bring it a step closer to an IPO, which could come later this year. A confidential IPO filing by the maker of ChatGPT is expected within weeks, Bloomberg News has reported. [OpenAI]

item.title: MapmyIndia replaces Google Maps in Amazon Now, launches AI address verification for banks: Q4FY26
item.description: Amazon Now, Geo-Verify, delayed government contracts, and a growing order book dominated MapmyIndia's Q4FY26 earnings call. The post MapmyIndia replaces Google Maps in Amazon Now, launches AI address verification for banks: Q4FY26 appeared first on MEDIANAMA. [Amazon, Alphabet, ServiceNow]

item.title: Why is Dell’s stock surging on AI servers? #tech
item.description: Dell shares jump as AI server demand boosts results Dell’s stock surged roughly 33% in a single day after the company reported results that analysts linked to strong demand for AI servers. CNBC described the move as Dell’s best day ever, with the company also… [Dell Technologies]

item.title: Study: Big Tech Can Extract $1 Million Per Person from Personal Data Over Lifetime
item.description: Tech companies could extract up to $1.08 million per U.S. resident from their personal data over a 60-year internet usage period, according to a study by the Web3 Foundation. The free-internet group analyzed data from ages 13 to 73, a typical person’s main we…

item.title: Google built the answer to your AI bill before you knew you had a problem
item.description: Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash rivals frontier AI models at a fraction of the cost, as companies burn through annual token budgets within months of the year starting.  [Alphabet]

item.title: Bitcoin’s biggest quantum risk may not be wallet keys. An early investor fears something bigger
item.description: Andrew Gault, the venture capitalist who funded the quantum hardware labs now threatening bitcoin, says the industry is looking in the wrong place. Google's own security team moved in the same direction in March. [Alphabet, ServiceNow]

item.title: Wall Street Week Ahead: Jobs report on tap for soaring US stocks as rate path, bond yields eyed as risks
item.description: Indian markets are watching US economic indicators next week. Investors are concerned about rising inflation and potential interest rate hikes. The upcoming jobs report and Broadcom's earnings will be crucial. These events could impact the ongoing rally in US… [Broadcom]

item.title: Oracle vs SAP Stocks 2026: Cloud AI Surge — Oracle's Infrastructure Edge or SAP's ERP Strength?
